featured.title: The 99 Names of Allah — Al-Asmā' al-Ḥusnā
featured.description: Mufti Menk explores the profound meanings of Allah's Most Beautiful Names and how knowing them transforms your relationship with your Creator.

featured.title: Tawheed: The Oneness of Allah
featured.description: The central concept in Islam — its three dimensions, what it means in practice, and why everything in the Deen revolves around it.

featured.title: The Story of Prophet Yusuf ﷺ
featured.description: Described by Allah as 'the best of stories' — Nouman Ali Khan unveils layers of wisdom from Surah Yusuf that speak to every human heart.

featured.title: The Shahadah: Gateway to Islam
featured.description: The declaration of faith — its seven conditions, its weight, and how truly living it transforms every aspect of your life.

featured.title: The Power of Dua
featured.description: How supplication connects you directly to Allah — the etiquette, the best times, and life-changing duas from the Quran and Sunnah.

featured.title: Seerah of the Prophet Muhammad ﷺ
featured.description: Dr. Yasir Qadhi's landmark Seerah series — from birth in Makkah to the Farewell Sermon that shaped civilisation.

featured.title: Ramadan: The Month of Mercy
featured.description: Complete guide to Ramadan — its rulings, spiritual secrets, Laylat al-Qadr, and how to make every moment count.

featured.title: The Miracle of the Quran — Linguistic & Scientific
featured.description: Hamza Tzortzis presents the case for the Quran's inimitability (I'jaz) — why no human could have authored this Book.

featured.title: Purification of the Heart (Tazkiyah)
featured.description: Ibn al-Qayyim's road map to a clean heart — diseases of the heart, their cures, and the path to spiritual excellence.

featured.title: The Concept of Ihsan — Worshipping as if You See Allah
featured.description: Sheikh Omar Suleiman unpacks the third level of the religion — beyond Islam and Iman — and how to reach Ihsan.

featured.title: Jannah: What Awaits the Believers
featured.description: Vivid descriptions of Paradise from the Quran and authentic Hadith — rivers, palaces, companionship, and the greatest reward of seeing Allah.

featured.title: Why Every Muslim Should Learn Arabic
featured.description: Ustadh Nouman Ali Khan makes the case for learning the language of the Quran — and practical first steps to get started.
